evidence_summary: Axsome Therapeutics, Limited is an Irish subsidiary of Axsome Therapeutics, Inc. This relationship is explicitly documented in the company's SEC filings, specifically Exhibit 21.1 (List of Subsidiaries) of its Annual Report (Form 10-K) filed in February 2024 and referenced in 2026 data. Axsome Therapeutics, Inc. is the parent company based in Delaware, while Axsome Therapeutics, Limited is its subsidiary incorporated in Ireland.
